"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test_logger.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw32\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test_logger.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test_logger.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw32\bin\C__~1.EXE -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test_logger.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\test_logger.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib\libtest_logger.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test_logger.dir\linkLibs.rsp
